description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and build, using the weboaks/node-karma-protractor-chrome Docker image as the default and defining a VERSION_ID variable set to '0.8'. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the commands 'yarn', 'yarn lint', and 'yarn test' on the default image. Add a build job in the build stage that uses the electronuserland/builder:wine image, runs only on the master branch, and executes: export DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M); sed "s/0.0.0/${VERSION_ID}.${DATE}/g" package.json > _package.json && mv _package.json package.json; yarn && yarn electron:windows && yarn electron:linux. The build job should publish all files matching $CI_PROJECT_DIR/release/*.* as artifacts that never expire (expire_in: 1000 yrs).
